flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Maine rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($12.0k → $13.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Maine fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at University of Maine rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 (75.6% → 83.4%).
